title: Another TSAN report on database rename
description:
### Describe the bug
There is still another corner case seen here: https://s3.amazonaws.com/clickhouse-test-reports/json.html?REF=master&sha=52366a69809f0263b8755eb9798779ebb2f24a23&name_0=MasterCI&name_1=BuzzHouse+%28amd_tsan%29
### How to reproduce
Run these statements on a TSAN build (set --ignore-error):
```sql
CREATE DATABASE d0 ENGINE = Atomic;
CREATE TABLE d0.t0 (c0 Int) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY tuple();
CREATE DICTIONARY d1 (c0 Int DEFAULT 1) PRIMARY KEY (c0) SOURCE(CLICKHOUSE(DB 'd0' TABLE 't0')) LAYOUT(FLAT()) LIFETIME(10);
RENAME DATABASE d0 TO d2; --DB::Exception: Cannot drop or rename d0.t0, because some tables depend on it: default.d1. (HAVE_DEPENDENT_OBJECTS)
ALTER DATABASE d0 MODIFY COMMENT 'ups';
```
### Error message and/or stacktrace
Stack trace:
```
==================
WARNING: ThreadSanitizer: lock-order-inversion (potential deadlock) (pid=2353102)
Cycle in lock order graph: M0 (0x7254000502b0) => M1 (0x727400001410) => M0
Mutex M1 acquired here while holding mutex M0 in thread T8:
#0 pthread_mutex_lock <null> (clickhouse-tsan+0x970520e) (BuildId: 6fa6bb32e9ae5c9e2004ea0b67d6401f42fbb4f5)
#1 std::__1::__libcpp_mutex_lock[abi:ne210105](pthread_mutex_t*) contrib/llvm-project/libcxx/include/__thread/support/pthread.h:95:10 (clickhouse-tsan+0x2e4dead9) (BuildId: 6fa6bb32e9ae5c9e2004ea0b67d6401f42fbb4f5)
#2 std::__1::mutex::lock() contrib/llvm-project/libcxx/src/mutex.cpp:30:12 (clickhouse-tsan+0x2e4dead9)
#3 std::__1::lock_guard<std::__1::mutex>::lock_guard[abi:ne210105](std::__1::mutex&) contrib/llvm-project/libcxx/include/__mutex/lock_guard.h:32:10 (clickhouse-tsan+0x1d57dafd) (BuildId: 6fa6bb32e9ae5c9e2004ea0b67d6401f42fbb4f5)
#4 DB::DatabaseCatalog::checkTableCanBeRemovedOrRenamed(DB::StorageID const&, bool, bool, bool) const src/Interpreters/DatabaseCatalog.cpp:1724:21 (clickhouse-tsan+0x1d57dafd)
#5 DB::DatabaseAtomic::renameDatabase(std::__1::shared_ptr<DB::Context const>, std::__1::basic_string<char, std::__1::char_traits<char>, std::__1::allocator<char>> const&) src/Databases/DatabaseAtomic.cpp:718:41 (clickhouse-tsan+0x1bf0ce0a) (BuildId: 6fa6bb32e9ae5c9e2004ea0b67d6401f42fbb4f5)
#6 DB::InterpreterRenameQuery::executeToDatabase(DB::ASTRenameQuery const&, std::__1::vector<DB::RenameDescription, std::__1::allocator<DB::RenameDescription>> const&) src/Interpreters/InterpreterRenameQuery.cpp:198:13 (clickhouse-tsan+0x1d756552) (BuildId: 6fa6bb32e9ae5c9e2004ea0b67d6401f42fbb4f5)
#7 DB::InterpreterRenameQuery::execute() src/Interpreters/InterpreterRenameQuery.cpp:80:16 (clickhouse-tsan+0x1d7555db) (BuildId: 6fa6bb32e9ae5c9e2004ea0b67d6401f42fbb4f5)
#8 DB::executeQueryImpl(char const*, char const*, std::__1::shared_ptr<DB::Context>, DB::QueryFlags, DB::QueryProcessingStage::Enum, std::__1::unique_ptr<DB::ReadBuffer, std::__1::default_delete<DB::ReadBuffer>>&, std::__1::shared_ptr<DB::IAST>&, std::__1::shared_ptr<DB::ImplicitTransactionControlExecutor>, std::__1::function<void ()>) src/Interpreters/executeQuery.cpp:1608:40 (clickhouse-tsan+0x1dc25f8a) (BuildId: 6fa6bb32e9ae5c9e2004ea0b67d6401f42fbb4f5)
#9 DB::executeQuery(std::__1::basic_string<char, std::__1::char_traits<char>, std::__1::allocator<char>> const&, std::__1::shared_ptr<DB::Context>, DB::QueryFlags, DB::QueryProcessingStage::Enum) src/Interpreters/executeQuery.cpp:1817:11 (clickhouse-tsan+0x1dc1fc95) (BuildId: 6fa6bb32e9ae5c9e2004ea0b67d6401f42fbb4f5)
#10 DB::TCPHandler::runImpl() src/Server/TCPHandler.cpp:765:68 (clickhouse-tsan+0x237567f5) (BuildId: 6fa6bb32e9ae5c9e2004ea0b67d6401f42fbb4f5)
#11 DB::TCPHandler::run() src/Server/TCPHandler.cpp:2861:9 (clickhouse-tsan+0x237803a7) (BuildId: 6fa6bb32e9ae5c9e2004ea0b67d6401f42fbb4f5)
#12 Poco::Net::TCPServerConnection::start() base/poco/Net/src/TCPServerConnection.cpp:40:3 (clickhouse-tsan+0x2b856162) (BuildId: 6fa6bb32e9ae5c9e2004ea0b67d6401f42fbb4f5)
#13 Poco::Net::TCPServerDispatcher::run() base/poco/Net/src/TCPServerDispatcher.cpp:115:38 (clickhouse-tsan+0x2b856a31) (BuildId: 6fa6bb32e9ae5c9e2004ea0b67d6401f42fbb4f5)
#14 Poco::PooledThread::run() base/poco/Foundation/src/ThreadPool.cpp:205:14 (clickhouse-tsan+0x2b7c0c50) (BuildId: 6fa6bb32e9ae5c9e2004ea0b67d6401f42fbb4f5)
#15 Poco::(anonymous namespace)::RunnableHolder::run() base/poco/Foundation/src/Thread.cpp:45:11 (clickhouse-tsan+0x2b7bee2f) (BuildId: 6fa6bb32e9ae5c9e2004ea0b67d6401f42fbb4f5)
#16 Poco::ThreadImpl::runnableEntry(void*) base/poco/Foundation/src/Thread_POSIX.cpp:341:27 (clickhouse-tsan+0x2b7bd1c9) (BuildId: 6fa6bb32e9ae5c9e2004ea0b67d6401f42fbb4f5)
Mutex M0 previously acquired by the same thread here:
#0 pthread_mutex_lock <null> (clickhouse-tsan+0x970520e) (BuildId: 6fa6bb32e9ae5c9e2004ea0b67d6401f42fbb4f5)
#1 std::__1::__libcpp_mutex_lock[abi:ne210105](pthread_mutex_t*) contrib/llvm-project/libcxx/include/__thread/support/pthread.h:95:10 (clickhouse-tsan+0x2e4dead9) (BuildId: 6fa6bb32e9ae5c9e2004ea0b67d6401f42fbb4f5)
#2 std::__1::mutex::lock() contrib/llvm-project/libcxx/src/mutex.cpp:30:12 (clickhouse-tsan+0x2e4dead9)
#3 std::__1::lock_guard<std::__1::mutex>::lock_guard[abi:ne210105](std::__1::mutex&) contrib/llvm-project/libcxx/include/__mutex/lock_guard.h:32:10 (clickhouse-tsan+0x1bf0cd32) (BuildId: 6fa6bb32e9ae5c9e2004ea0b67d6401f42fbb4f5)
#4 DB::DatabaseAtomic::renameDatabase(std::__1::shared_ptr<DB::Context const>, std::__1::basic_string<char, std::__1::char_traits<char>, std::__1::allocator<char>> const&) src/Databases/DatabaseAtomic.cpp:713:25 (clickhouse-tsan+0x1bf0cd32)
#5 DB::InterpreterRenameQuery::executeToDatabase(DB::ASTRenameQuery const&, std::__1::vector<DB::RenameDescription, std::__1::allocator<DB::RenameDescription>> const&) src/Interpreters/InterpreterRenameQuery.cpp:198:13 (clickhouse-tsan+0x1d756552) (BuildId: 6fa6bb32e9ae5c9e2004ea0b67d6401f42fbb4f5)
#6 DB::InterpreterRenameQuery::execute() src/Interpreters/InterpreterRenameQuery.cpp:80:16 (clickhouse-tsan+0x1d7555db) (BuildId: 6fa6bb32e9ae5c9e2004ea0b67d6401f42fbb4f5)
#7 DB::executeQueryImpl(char const*, char const*, std::__1::shared_ptr<DB::Context>, DB::QueryFlags, DB::QueryProcessingStage::Enum, std::__1::unique_ptr<DB::ReadBuffer, std::__1::default_delete<DB::ReadBuffer>>&, std::__1::shared_ptr<DB::IAST>&, std::__1::shared_ptr<DB::ImplicitTransactionControlExecutor>, std::__1::function<void ()>) src/Interpreters/executeQuery.cpp:1608:40 (clickhouse-tsan+0x1dc25f8a) (BuildId: 6fa6bb32e9ae5c9e2004ea0b67d6401f42fbb4f5)

bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE d1.t1 (c1 INTEGER, c2 VARCHAR, c3 DOUBLE DEFAULT 0.0);
CREATE TABLE d2 AS SELECT c1, c2 FROM d1.t1;
key_bug_features: Renaming a database with dependent objects causes deadlock
